title: NULL-CONTROL-V1 Broad Slot Simulation
question: How often does a broad null model reproduce the clean f2r and f2v grammar result?
result: No simulation out of 100000 reproduced the joint clean result, but the null was too broad.
interpretation: Exploratory only: the model allowed structurally implausible slot values and therefore overstated surprise.
limitations: Naive independence estimate not accepted as main p-value
